# freeemojipicker.app

> Free emoji picker — search, click, copy, and paste emojis instantly.

## Summary

freeemojipicker.app is a free, browser-based emoji picker with 900+ emojis across 9 categories: Smileys, People, Animals, Food, Activities, Travel, Objects, Symbols, and Flags. Users search by name or keyword, click to copy, and paste anywhere. No account, install, or extension required.

## Key Facts

- 927 emojis included inline (no external API dependency)
- 9 categories: Smileys, People, Animals, Food, Activities, Travel, Objects, Symbols, Flags
- Instant search filtering by emoji name and keywords
- Single-click copy to clipboard
- Multi-select mode: build an emoji string and copy all at once
- Skin tone support for hand and people emojis (6 tones per emoji)
- Recently copied emojis saved in localStorage (last 20)
- Dark mode with localStorage persistence
- Fully responsive: desktop, tablet, and mobile
- All processing runs client-side in the browser
- No tracking, no ads, no sign-up, no server requests
- PWA-ready with service worker and manifest
- Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript (single index.html file)

## URL

https://freeemojipicker.app/

## Part of

https://freesuite.app/
